turns.question: Oh my gosh, look who it is! It's been forever!
turns.answer: I know, right? Way too long.

turns.question: Wait, is that you? I haven't seen you in years!
turns.answer: It really has been years, hasn't it?

turns.question: No way, I didn't expect to run into you here!
turns.answer: Me neither, what a small world.

turns.question: How long has it been, like five years?
turns.answer: Honestly, I think it's closer to six at this point.

turns.question: You look exactly the same, it's crazy.
turns.answer: Ha, you're too kind -- you look great too.

turns.question: I can't believe we lost touch for this long.
turns.answer: I know, life just got in the way, I guess.

turns.question: So what have you been up to all these years?
turns.answer: A lot, honestly -- changed jobs, moved cities, the usual chaos.

turns.question: Are you still living in the same place?
turns.answer: No, actually, I moved away a couple years ago.

turns.question: Do you still keep in touch with anyone from back then?
turns.answer: A few people, but definitely not as much as I should.

turns.question: I heard you got married, congrats by the way!
turns.answer: Oh, thank you! Yeah, it's been a couple years now.

turns.question: Are you still doing the same job you used to?
turns.answer: Nope, I actually switched careers a while back.

turns.question: This is such a nice surprise, we should catch up properly.
turns.answer: Definitely, let's grab coffee sometime soon.

turns.question: It's so good to see your face again.
turns.answer: You too, I've missed this.

turns.question: Wow, the last time I saw you, things were so different.
turns.answer: Tell me about it, a lot has changed since then.

turns.question: Do you still talk to any of the old crew?
turns.answer: A couple of them, but we drifted apart mostly.

turns.question: I can't believe how much time has passed.
turns.answer: I know, it feels like just yesterday, honestly.

turns.question: Are your parents still doing okay?
turns.answer: Yeah, they're doing great, thanks for asking.

turns.question: You haven't changed a bit, seriously.
turns.answer: Neither have you, somehow.

turns.question: How's life been treating you all this time?
turns.answer: Pretty good overall, ups and downs like everyone.

turns.question: I always wondered what happened to you.
turns.answer: Ha, nothing too exciting, just life happening.

turns.question: Do you remember the last time we hung out?
turns.answer: Vaguely, I think it was right before you moved.

turns.question: It's crazy running into you after all this time.
turns.answer: Seriously, what are the odds?

turns.question: Are you still in touch with our old boss?
turns.answer: Actually, yeah, we still message occasionally.

turns.question: So did you end up finishing school, in the end?
turns.answer: Yeah, finally, took me a bit longer than planned.

turns.question: We really need to stop losing touch like this.
turns.answer: Agreed, let's actually exchange numbers this time.

turns.question: I heard through the grapevine you had a kid, congrats!
turns.answer: Ha, word travels fast -- yeah, she's two now.

turns.question: You look so different, in a good way!
turns.answer: Ha, thanks, I guess a few years will do that.

turns.question: Do you still live near your old neighborhood?
turns.answer: No, I actually moved across town a while back.

turns.question: I can't get over how long it's actually been.
turns.answer: Same, it doesn't even feel real.

turns.question: We have so much catching up to do.
turns.answer: We really do, where do we even start?
